geography.data_source: Greater Chennai Corporation ward map 2022, GCC boundary shapefiles for Anna Nagar-Kilpauk zone

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Chennai district tables, Anna Nagar ward-level data, estimated growth at 0.8% CAGR for established residential area

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Tamil Nadu urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, adjusted for Anna Nagar's established middle-class profile

commute_profile.data_source: CMRL Blue Line ridership 2023, CMP Chennai 2018 mode share, Anna Nagar high car ownership from vehicle registration data

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from middle-class residential zone behaviour, higher institutional trust in established areas, Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Tamil Nadu data

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from established residential area network patterns, high clustering due to RWA and long-term neighbourhood bonds, senior citizen concentration

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Anna Nagar 2nd Avenue commercial strip activity, GCC commercial zone survey
Estimated from Kilpauk market area activity survey

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Adjusted Middle Income Residential template for Anna Nagar's established residential character, elevated retired/senior citizen weight per AGENT_SPEC senior citizen zone reference

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from GCC ward councillor count, strong RWA presence in Anna Nagar
